chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-5343/2013 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 24.09.2021 Mr. Matlab Hussain Qureshi advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG alongwith Abdul Jabbar Shahani, Litigation Officer, SELD................ Heard and perused the record. 2. Grievance redressal committee as notified by the Secretary, SELD shall examine the case of the petitioner within the spirit of examination conducted by the NTS and petitioner’s qualifications as well as locality of the area where he is contending that schools are closed due to non-availability of teachers though they qualified the NTS examination; respondents’ plea is that there was only one post required by them and the candidate that achieved 85% marks has been appointed while petitioner could only secure 80%. 3. However this issue pertains to the year 2013 and it would be appropriate to refer the matter to that afore mentioned Committee to examine documents of petitioner and other criteria, and thereafter pass appropriate recommendations in accordance with law. 4. Needless to mention that any recommendations by the department would not be treated as pejorative act and competent authority would be at liberty to decide the fate within the need-base - { 2 } - policy relating to that area and the qualifications of the petitioner; and will not be challenged by the petitioner. 5. Needless to mention that this order is in-personam and shall not be treated as in-rem for likewise other candidates if available.

Needless to mention that any recommendations by the department would not be treated as pejorative act and competent authority would be at liberty to decide the fate within the need-base - { 2 } - policy relating to that area and the qualifications of the petitioner; and will not be challenged by the petitioner. 5. Needless to mention that this order is in-personam and shall not be treated as in-rem for likewise other candidates if available. Petition is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E IK
